title: Client for the Notion API
text: notionapi R client library Notion API, enabling users programmatically interact Notion workspaces. package provides complete API coverage managing pages databases, managing content blocks, handling comments retrieving user information. package designed mirror Official Notion JavaScript Client, using R6 classes provide familiar object-oriented interface consistent API structure.

title: Client for the Notion API
text: Install package CRAN: install development version GitHub:

title: Client for the Notion API
text: initialise Notion client, need Notion integration token. Create integration Notion workspace following instructions. Copy integration token integration settings. Set token environment variable: Share pages/databases integration Notion. Restart R session load environment variable.

title: Client for the Notion API
text: Use notion_client() async_notion_client() create client instance accessing API endpoints: client organises methods logical endpoint groups like pages, databases, blocks. method maps directly endpoint, parameters available function arguments. See Notion API reference complete endpoint documentation. API responses automatically converted JSON R lists.
code: library(notionapi)  # Create a Notion client instance notion <- notion_client()  # Access the users endpoint to list all users in your Notion workspace resp <- notion$users$list() resp #> { #>   "object": "list", #>   "results": [ #>     { #>       "object": "user", #>       "id": "fda12729-108d-4eb5-bbfb-a8f0886794d1", #>       "name": "Brenwin", #>       "avatar_url": {}, #>       "type": "person", #>       "person": {} #>     }, #>     { #>       "object": "user", #>       "id": "6b786605-e456-4237-9c61-5efaff23c081", #>       "name": "brenwin-internal", #>       "avatar_url": {}, #>       "type": "bot", #>       "bot": { #>         "owner": { #>           "type": "workspace", #>           "workspace": true #>         }, #>         "workspace_name": "Brenwin's Notion", #>         "workspace_id": "8c95f187-450c-4f67-a013-54f17e298330", #>         "workspace_limits": { #>           "max_file_upload_size_in_bytes": 5368709120 #>         } #>       } #>     } #>   ], #>   "next_cursor": {}, #>   "has_more": false, #>   "type": "user", #>   "user": {}, #>   "request_id": "45cb6304-4905-440e-8998-27a49d255210" #> } # Extract specific fields from the response (list subsetting) vapply(resp$results, "[[", "", "type") #> [1] "person" "bot"

text: Updated support Notion API version 2026-03-11 (previously 2022-06-28). changes reflect updates made comply latest Notion API.

title: notionapi 0.2.0
text: DatabasesEndpoint$create() longer accepts properties parameter per API changes. Use DataSourcesEndpoint create databases properties. DatabasesEndpoint$query() removed following API deprecation. Use DataSourcesEndpoint$query() instead. PagesPropertiesEndpoint$update() removed endpoint deprecated Notion API.

title: notionapi 0.2.0
text: DataSourcesEndpoint: Manage data sources (table views databases) $create(), $retrieve(), $update(), $query(), $list_templates(). Supports full property configuration. FileUploadsEndpoint: Upload files Notion $create(), $send(), $complete(), $retrieve(), $list(). Supports single-part (≤20MB), multi-part (>20MB), external URL imports. ViewsEndpoint: Manage database views $create(), $retrieve(), $update(), $delete(), $list(). ViewsQueriesEndpoint: Execute view queries $create(), $results(), $delete(). CustomEmojisEndpoint: Access workspace custom emojis via $list().

title: notionapi 0.2.0
text: $create() gains content, markdown, template, position parameters. $update() gains is_locked, template, erase_content parameters. $retrieve_markdown(): New method retrieve page content Notion-flavored Markdown. $update_markdown(): New method update page content using Markdown update_content, replace_content, insert_content, replace_content_range operations. $move(): New method move pages parents.

title: notionapi 0.2.0
